name: PhysicsCar
shortDescription: Simulate top-down car motion with drifting.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Simulate 2D car motion, from a top-down view.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: PhysicsCar

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateRightKey
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a press of the right key.

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateLeftKey
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a press of the left key.

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateUpKey
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a press of the up key.

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateDownKey
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a press of the down key.

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateSteeringStick
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate a steering stick for a given axis force.

eventsFunctions.name: SimulateAccelerationStick
eventsFunctions.description: Simulate an acceleration stick for a given axis force.

eventsFunctions.name: DrawDebug
eventsFunctions.description: Draw forces applying on the car for debug purpose.

eventsFunctions.name: SteeringAngle
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the steering angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSteeringAngle
eventsFunctions.description: Change the steering angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: Acceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the acceleration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetAcceleration
eventsFunctions.description: Change the acceleration of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SpeedMax
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the maximum speed of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSpeedMax
eventsFunctions.description: Change the maximum speed of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: WheelGripRatio
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the wheel grip ratio of the object (from 0 to 1). A ratio of 0 is like driving on ice.

eventsFunctions.name: SetWheelGripRatio
eventsFunctions.description: Change the wheel grip ratio of the object (from 0 to 1). A ratio of 0 is like driving on ice.

eventsFunctions.name: SteeringAngleMax
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the maximum steering angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSteeringAngleMax
eventsFunctions.description: Change the maximum steering angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SteeringSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the steering speed of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSteeringSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the steering speed of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SteeringBackSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the sterring speed when turning back of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSteeringBackSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the sterring speed when turning back of the object.

description: Simulate car motion, from a top-down view, with the 2D Physics Engine behavior.
